title: How I Built My Own AI Toolkit to Win a Hackathon and the Workflows That Made It Possible
description: Three open-source tools and one core workflow — karpathy-skills, UI2MD, tinyfish-skills, and the LLM wiki — that powered a Vanta Security Prize win at the O1 Summit Hackathon.

title: What If Your Health AI Literally Couldn't Sell Your Data? We Built One to Find Out
description: How we built Sirius in 24 hours — a privacy-first health AI running Gemma E2B entirely on-device with on-device voice, camera OCR, and peer-to-peer sync between iPhone and Mac.

title: I Was Building a Mafia Game. I Accidentally Built an AI Framework.
description: A deep dive into the memory architecture, prompt engineering, and accidental framework that came out of 10 weeks at Supercell's AI Innovation Lab in Helsinki.

title: US Student Visa (F1 Visa) Application, Biometric, and Interview Experience 2024–2025
description: A step-by-step walkthrough of the entire F1 Student Visa process — DS-160, SEVIS fee, slot booking, biometric, and consular interview — based on a Chennai experience in June 2024.
